Compute Posterior Summaries

Source: R/utils_posterior.R
posterior_summaries.Rd

A wrapper around posterior::summarise_draws() to compute summaries directly from a befa object.

Usage

posterior_summaries(befa_fit, pars, ...)

Arguments

befa_fit

A befa object.

pars

Character vector. Parameter names to summarize.

...

Additional arguments passed to posterior::summarise_draws().

Value

A data frame of summaries.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
befa_fit <- befa(
  data = HS_data, n_factors = 3, model = "cor",
  iter = 500, chains = 2, seed = 123
)

# Posterior summaries of communalities
posterior_summaries(befa_fit, pars = "h2")
} # }
